Books I have read, am reading or plan to read in 2015...

📅 January 01, 2015


Many thanks to @paullawleyjones for putting me on to shelfari.com and pointing out that it is available as an embeddable widget. 
I plan to record all my reading in 2015 on this page and so avoid that terrible mental blank that can descend when someone asks me what I've just read!
